updates.tweet_text:
Nice little pre-FOMC move in #ES_F and it was thanks to the burst of volatility we had. Volatility means we can stop sitting on hands and trade. I posted at 11:01AM 7578 must recover to see 7590 magnet. We recovered 7578, just hit 7590

7600, 7611 if bulls want more on this https://t.co/gZy6aFoRTT
updates.notes: 7600 and 7611 appear but 7611 is a morning plan level; 7600 is listed without naming language—no 'key','added','watching', etc. Reaffirmation/directional list only.

updates.tweet_text:
Initial FOMC reaction in the books in #ES_F. We got a clean pre-FOMC long. The 7578 reclaim was long trigger posted, with 7590 target. We hit 7590 before FOMC and dipped, now flushing again.

7545-50, 7525, 7511 below. 7578 must reclaim now to rally back to 7590+ again. https://t.co/jfsyAbXYbi
updates.notes: 7578 is a reaffirmation of a posted trigger; 7545-50/7525/7511 are observations/directional list of existing levels; 7590 is morning plan level. No new actionable levels.

updates.tweet_text:
